headline: Why O'Reilly Automotive (ORLY) Is Up 6.6% After Strong Q1 2026 Same-Store Sales And Earnings
summary: In late April 2026, O’Reilly Automotive reported first‑quarter 2026 results showing sales rising to US$4,560.54 million and net income to US$604.18 million, with diluted EPS increasing to US$0.72 from US$0.62 a year earlier. The company’s 8.1% comparable store sales growth, 14% operating profit increase, and continued share repurchases underline how its scale and distribution advantages are helping it win business from smaller independent competitors. We’ll now explore how this strong...
